description:
Feature：

  • 125Pcs Complete Survival Kit: This 125Pcs emergency survival kit contains all the items you need for outdoor activities, such as multifunctional axe, shovel, tactical pen, flashlight, compass, raincoat, thermal blanket, a set of first aid kits and so on. Perfect for taking care of any medical or emergency needs during outdoor wilderness adventures.

 

  • Exclusive First Aid Kit: With total 100 pieces of medical first aid supplies and essential items including tourniquet, medical tape, scissors, tweezers, sterile gauze pads, alcohol pads, safety pins, bandages, cotton swabs, etc., allowing you to deal with wound in time to prevent infection. Perfect for taking care of any medical emergency.

 

  • Practical And Widely Applied: This survival gear is a must-have for hiking, climbing, camping, fishing and other outdoor adventures. It’s also practical for doctors, military personnel, police, firefighters, and first aid personnel who often deal with the wounded. Also suit for natural disasters survival emergency, like earthquakes, hurricanes, tornados, floods and fires.

 

  • Convenient And Portable: All of these survival equipment are packed in durable and wear-resistant and water-resistant pouch measuring 8.66x6.3x1.97in, which is easy for you to carrying outside. The buckle strap design allows it to be attached to mountain bike, backpack, etc.. You can take it anywhere you go with this lightweight and compact bag.

 

  • Durable & Perfect Gifts: Made of premium ABS and aluminum alloy material , it’s durable, sturdy and sharp enough to penetrate hard surface. It‘s a great gift for family, friend, father, boyfriend, and son who loves outdoor exploring. Just enjoy a more relaxed and safe adventure with this well-prepared survival kit.

Specification：

Product Type: 125Pcs Survival Kits
Color: Multi-Color
Material: Aluminum Alloy, ABS, Oxford Cloth
Flashlight Powered By: 1Pc AA Battery(Not Included)
First Aid Kit Bag Size: 19x13x4cm/7.48x5.12x1.57in
PBT Bandage Size: 5x450cm/1.97x177.17in
Triangular Bandage Size: 96x96x136cm/37.8x37.8x53.54in
Sterile Gauze Pad Size: 5x5cm/1.97x1.97in
Thermal Blanket Size: 130x210cm/51.18x82.68in
Parachute Cord Length: 9.9m/32.48ft
Shovel Size(Installed): 41x9.5x4.5cm/16.14x3.74x1.77in
Axe Size: 17x9x3cm/6.69x3.54x1.18in
Emergency Shelter Size: 8x5x3ft; With Cord: 20ft
Survival Bracelet: 26x3x1.5cm/10.24x1.18x0.59in
Wire Saw Wire Length: 59cm/23.23in
Item Size: 22x16x15cm/8.66x6.3x5.9in
Item Weight: 1837g/4.05lbs
Package Size: 21x15x16cm/8.27x5.91x6.3in
Package Weight: 1889g/4.16 lbs

PackageContents：

1 Bag x First Aid Kit(Total 100Pcs) [1 x First Aid Kit Storage Bag, 1 x Tourniquet, 1 x Medical Tape, 1 x Triangular Bandage, 1 x Scissors, 1 x Tweezers, 2 x PBT Bandages, 2 x Sterile Gauze Pads, 10 x Alcohol Pads, 10 x Iodophor Pads, 20 x Safety Pins, 20 x Bandages, 1Bag x Cotton Swabs(30Pcs)]
1 x Compass
1 x Multifunctional Card
1 x Shovel
1 x Shovel Bag
1 x Emergency Shelter with Cord
1Pair x Gloves
1 x Multifunctional Axe
1 x Axe Bag
1 x Parachute Cord
1 x Whistle
1 x Water Bottle Buckle
1 x Wire Saw
1 x Survival Bracelet with Compass & Fire Starter
1Bag x Fishing Tool
1 x Multifunctional Knife And Fork
1 x Blowpipe
1 x Fire Starter
1 x Tactical Pen
1 x Flashlight
1 x Thermal Blanket
1 x Backpack
2 x Raincoats
2 x Carabiners
1 x User Manual

Note:

* Raincoat is disposable.

* Hands wash is recommended for thermal blanket and emergency shelter.
